title: CanonicalDocument
description: A normalized, source-traceable document produced by the ingestion pipeline. Represents one logical section of a source.

source_id.description: Registry identifier matching an entry in source_registry.yaml

title.description: Full title of the source book or document

authority_level.description: Source authority: 1 = official rulebook (highest), 5 = personal note (lowest)

section_path.description: Ordered path from root to leaf section (e.g., ['Chapter 3: Classes', 'Fighter', 'Class Features'])

page_range.description: Inclusive page range of this section in the source

content.description: Normalized text content of the section

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the raw source file used during ingestion

version.description: Optional version or printing identifier for the source

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this document was produced
